basics.name: David Castrillón Gonzales
basics.label: Senior Full-Stack Developer (React, TypeScript, Node.js, Go)
basics.summary: Senior Full‑Stack Developer specializing in React and TypeScript with backend experience in Node.js and Go. Builds microfrontend and SSR applications, REST APIs, and automated testing pipelines. Owns internal platforms (backoffice, reporting) and improves financial reconciliation workflows. Uses AI‑assisted workflows to increase delivery speed and solution quality.

work.name: Yuno
work.summary: Full‑stack development across reconciliation and data products using React, TypeScript, React Query, Vite microfrontends, and Node.js.
highlights: Tech stack: React, TypeScript, React Query, Vite (microfrontends), Remix/React Router v7 (SSR), Node.js, Tailwind CSS, ShadCN UI, Zustand, Vitest.
Improved reconciliation workflows and UI flows using React, TypeScript, and React Query within a microfrontend architecture.
Designed and implemented a user‑configurable alerting feature for reconciliation events (e.g., missing settlements and liquidations).
Contributed to the product redesign, focusing on UX improvements and maintainable frontend architecture.
Built the backend for a reporting product enabling report template creation and scheduled email delivery (Node.js, REST APIs).
Designed and scaffolded a company‑wide Backoffice SSR application; the architecture and scaffolding were adopted by multiple teams.
Applied AI‑assisted development practices across design, implementation, debugging, and documentation to improve engineering productivity.

work.name: Conekta
work.summary: Back‑office product development using React, TypeScript, Chakra UI, and Material UI, collaborating with Go and Node.js backends.
highlights: Tech stack: React, TypeScript, Chakra UI, Material UI, Go, Node.js, REST APIs.
Maintained and evolved a back‑office application using React and TypeScript.
Delivered new product functionality and improved operational workflows.
Collaborated with backend teams using Go and Node.js; integrated REST APIs end-to-end.
Contributed to UI consistency and component patterns using Chakra UI and Material UI.

work.name: Mercado Libre
work.summary: Frontend development for large‑scale products using React and TypeScript.
highlights: Tech stack: React, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS.
Contributed to an insurance application migration, delivering features using React and TypeScript.
Worked in distributed agile teams and large-scale codebases.

work.name: Bancolombia
work.summary: Test automation for web, mobile, and services using Selenium, Appium, Rest Assured, Cucumber, and Java (AS400).
highlights: Tech stack: Selenium, Appium, Rest Assured, Cucumber, Java, AS400.
Led testing teams and defined test automation strategies.
Built automated tests for web, mobile, and APIs using Selenium, Appium, and Rest Assured.
Created automated batch testing processes using AS400 libraries in Java.

projects.name: Portfolio
highlights: Built a personal portfolio to explore Astro and Tailwind CSS.
Focused on modern UI development and performance-friendly static rendering.
